# metaboTYPE2.0

This is a package for aligning, analyzing, and graphing multiple runs of
indirect calorimetry data.

The goal of metaboTYPE2.0 is to …

## Installation

You can install the development version of metaboTYPE2.0 like so:

``` r
# FILL THIS IN! HOW CAN PEOPLE INSTALL YOUR DEV PACKAGE?
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

``` r
library(metaboTYPE2.0)
## basic example code
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`print_hello_user()`](https://meagan-kingren.github.io/metaboTYPE2.0/reference/print_hello_user.md)
  : Print hello user
- [`print_hello_world()`](https://meagan-kingren.github.io/metaboTYPE2.0/reference/print_hello_world.md)
  : Print hello world
